page_content:
Prerequisite: BSCI330.

BSC1433 Biology of Cancer (3 Credits)

Causes and consequences of neoplastic transformations at the biochemical and cellular levels.

Prerequisite: BSCI222 and BSCI330; or permission of CMNS-Biological Sciences UG Program.

BSC1I436 RNA Biology and Therapeutics (3 Credits)

The prediction of RNA structure from its sequence, and how the

many types of cellular and viral RNAs function in and regulate cellular processes. Use of RNA-based drugs for controlling disease through RNA targeting, editing and vaccines.
